integrations_researched.name: Deepgram Voice Agent V1 SDK (Python)

api_patterns.initialization:
# Initialize client with API key
client = DeepgramClient(api_key=os.getenv("DEEPGRAM_API_KEY"))

# Establish agent connection as context manager
with client.agent.v1.connect() as connection:
    # Configure and use connection
    settings = AgentV1SettingsMessage(...)
    connection.send_settings(settings)
key_functions: client.agent.v1.connect() - Create Voice Agent V1 WebSocket connection
connection.start_listening() - Start listening for audio input

env_vars: OPENAI_API_KEY (required for Think provider with OpenAI)

think.prompt: You are a friendly AI assistant.

agent.greeting: Hello! How can I help you today?

gotchas: In v5.x SDK, keep-alive is NO LONGER automatic - must manually send AgentV1ControlMessage(type='KeepAlive')
Recommended to send KeepAlive every 8 seconds during periods of no audio transmission
Must use context manager pattern: 'with client.agent.v1.connect() as connection:'
DEEPGRAM_API_KEY environment variable is required - client initialization will fail without it
AgentV1SettingsMessage must be sent after connection opens (listen for EventType.OPEN first)
Audio messages are binary bytes - use 'isinstance(message, bytes)' to detect audio data
For v5.x migration from v3.x: keepAlive changed from config option to manual control message
OpenAI API key also required if using OpenAI as Think provider
Connection.close() is handled automatically by context manager

keepalive_implementation.description: Manual keep-alive control message for Agent V1 connections
keepalive_implementation.code_pattern:
from deepgram.extensions.types.sockets import AgentV1ControlMessage

# Send keep-alive message
connection.send_control(AgentV1ControlMessage(type='KeepAlive'))
keepalive_implementation.recommended_interval: Every 8 seconds during periods of no audio transmission
keepalive_implementation.note: Server does not send response to KeepAlive messages

integrations_researched.name: Git (Command-Line)

verified_package.name: git
verified_package.install_command: System package manager (apt, brew, chocolatey, etc.)

commands: git merge --allow-unrelated-histories <branch> - Force merge unrelated histories
git status - Check working tree status
git push - Push changes to remote

gotchas: --allow-unrelated-histories flag required when branches have no common commits
This situation typically occurs when: 1) Repository was re-initialized, 2) Branch from different repository was added
Merge conflicts may need manual resolution after force merge
GitHub PR UI cannot handle unrelated history merges - must use command line
After merge, need to push with 'git push' to update remote
Consider using 'git merge --allow-unrelated-histories --no-edit' to skip commit message prompt
Using '--allow-unrelated-histories' creates a merge commit combining both histories

unverified_claims.claim: Exact Python package version for deepgram-sdk
unverified_claims.reason: Context7 confirms 'deepgram-sdk' package exists but web search quota exceeded to verify latest version on PyPI
unverified_claims.mitigation: Context7 confirms v5.x is current version with Agent V1 support, package name verified

recommendations: Use Python deepgram-sdk for Voice Agent V1 integration
KeepAlive should be sent every 8 seconds via AgentV1ControlMessage when not transmitting audio
Use context manager pattern ('with client.agent.v1.connect() as connection:') for automatic cleanup
Set DEEPGRAM_API_KEY in .env file before running the application
For unrelated history git merge, use 'git merge --allow-unrelated-histories <branch>' from command line
Register event handlers (OPEN, MESSAGE, CLOSE, ERROR) before calling start_listening()
Handle binary audio data separately from JSON messages in MESSAGE event handler

git_merge.purpose: Merge branch with unrelated commit history into main
git_merge.location: Command line / terminal (NOT GitHub PR UI)
git_merge.trigger: Must complete before Epic 2 work begins

deepgram_sdk.purpose: Voice Agent V1 connection and keepAlive() implementation
